TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Klaus_Iohannis, title = Klaus_Iohannis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Klaus_Iohannis} }

S.FORM: = Klaus Iohannis = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 6 jiyax 13 ka Klaus Iohannis ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Romania ta sayang o kiya ka Klaus Iohannis, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 12 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = klaus ioħannis = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka klaus ioħannis ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɾomania ta sajaŋ o kija ka klaus ioħannis, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Klaus Iohannis = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 6 jiyax 13 ka Klaus Iohannis ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Romania ta sayang o kiya ka Klaus Iohannis, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 12 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = klaus ioħannis = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka klaus ioħannis ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɾomania ta sajaŋ o kija ka klaus ioħannis, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
